completed_tasks.name: Add a reproducible real-.blend debug harness and symbolized failure mode
Patch the loader/runtime path so a real sample loads and queries successfully
completed_tasks.progress: Updated source/wasm_headless_main.cc, fixed the MEM_new compile error by including BKE_wm_runtime.hh, identified the Emscripten Freetype/Wasm-exceptions longjmp mismatch, patched scripts/build-wasm-deps.sh to build freetype-legacysjlj, and patched scripts/patch-ninja-host-tools.sh to rewrite build.ninja to libfreetype-legacysjlj.a. A fresh Docker rebuild was started and intentionally interrupted during compile around [360/2355], so final link and runtime validation are still unverified.

remaining_tasks.name: Revalidate the Phase 01 release artifact and guard against regressions

blockers.description: The full Docker rebuild with the freetype-legacysjlj linker fix was interrupted before final link, so the final-link outcome is still unknown.
blockers.workaround: Resume with docker compose run --rm blender-wasm-build bash scripts/build-wasm-full.sh and confirm the link no longer fails on emscripten_longjmp.

blockers.description: The real-.blend load path is still unresolved until the rebuilt artifact can run BLEND_SAMPLE_PATH=/tmp/Blender-282.blend node scripts/test-blend-query.js without trapping.
blockers.workaround: If the rebuild succeeds, rerun the dedicated harness first and inspect the new failure boundary before changing more wrapper code.

blockers.description: The interrupted post-build Brotli step left build-wasm/blender.wasm.br at 0 bytes.
blockers.workaround: Regenerate artifacts via the next full build before relying on compressed output or phase verification numbers.
Replace placeholder text after Task 2 and Task 3 verification is complete so the phase artifacts match reality.

decisions.decision: Use scripts/test-blend-query.js with the official Blender-282.blend sample as the canonical phase-gap harness.
decisions.rationale: It reproduces the missing Phase 01 truth end to end without manual browser steps.

decisions.decision: Keep debug and symbolized diagnostics behind an env-controlled build mode instead of changing the default release flags.
decisions.rationale: The gap needed debuggability without permanently bloating release artifacts.

decisions.decision: Build and link against Emscripten's freetype-legacysjlj port variant when using Wasm exceptions.
decisions.rationale: The default libfreetype.a path pulled in emscripten_longjmp references that are incompatible with the current Wasm-exception build mode.

decisions.decision: Avoid destructive Docker cleanup such as volume pruning during pause.
decisions.rationale: Space was reclaimed from stopped containers and cache, but resume should stay straightforward and existing data should be preserved.

next_action: Run docker compose run --rm blender-wasm-build bash scripts/build-wasm-full.sh; if it links cleanly, immediately run BLEND_SAMPLE_PATH=/tmp/Blender-282.blend node scripts/test-blend-query.js, then rerun the four existing Node validation scripts.
context_notes: All Docker containers are stopped and there are no background processes left running. The last intentional state change was the freetype-legacysjlj fix in scripts/build-wasm-deps.sh and scripts/patch-ninja-host-tools.sh; the active build log confirmed both hooks fired before the rebuild was interrupted. Do not assume build-wasm/blender.wasm.br is valid, because it is currently 0 bytes from the aborted Brotli stage. The worktree was already dirty before pause, so resume carefully and do not revert unrelated changes.
